However, the memo's sensitivity-check numeric results (adverse 1% formulas) do not match the stated formulas when computed independently from the memo text, indicating a reproducibility or transcription error in the sensitivity worksheet or memo. Additionally, automated inspection of the XLSX was limited (openpyxl unavailable) so full formula-level confirmation was not possible.
